evidence: authorized Admin Socket.IO listener received one event

mobileDeviceCapture.environment: Android API 35 emulator connected to the isolated non-production E2E stack
mobileDeviceCapture.privacyReview: Approved: simulated location only; no coordinates, credentials, tokens, email addresses, or personal notifications are visible
evidence: Driver entered Online and the authenticated location command was accepted
PostGIS retained the last location snapshot and the Android location foreground service was active only while Online
Driver returned Offline, the foreground service stopped, and the database online flag changed to false

customerLoginCapture.environment: Android API 35 emulator; Customer app-launch screen before authentication routing
customerLoginCapture.privacyReview: Approved: no coordinates, credentials, tokens, email addresses, or personal notifications are visible; the WebP contains no EXIF/GPS profile

mobileRoleCapture.environment: Android API 35 x86_64 emulator connected to the isolated foodflow-batch4-e2e stack
mobileRoleCapture.build: Flutter debug APKs built from the current working tree with customer and driver flavors
mobileRoleCapture.location: Fixed simulated GPS only; no Google Maps API key is used
mobileRoleCapture.privacyReview: Deterministic local seed identities only. Passwords remain masked; profile contact and vehicle values are synthetic seed data; no tokens, provider keys, production accounts, or real personal data are visible
evidence: Driver authenticated through the local NestJS API; active-delivery Home explicitly showed that GPS sharing must resume while Offline
Driver earnings and profile surfaces rendered from deterministic seed data
Customer and Driver stills were visually reviewed after metadata stripping

webCapture.environment: Isolated foodflow-batch4-e2e Docker stack with deterministic seed data
webCapture.privacyReview: Deterministic local seed data only; no production credentials, tokens, provider keys, or personal browser content are visible
